no-restricted-globals.name: confirm
no-restricted-globals.message: Use useConfirm() / ConfirmDialog instead of the native confirm dialog (Issue #1113).

no-restricted-globals.name: alert
no-restricted-globals.message: Use a styled notification (e.g. Toast) instead of the native alert dialog (Issue #1113).

no-restricted-properties.message: Use useConfirm() / ConfirmDialog instead of window.confirm (Issue #1113).
